title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch with modern technologies like React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='600' height='400' viewBox='0 0 600 400'><defs><linearGradient id='g1' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='%237828c8'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='%23f31262'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(%23g1)'/><circle cx='500' cy='100' r='150' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.1'/><circle cx='100' cy='300' r='80' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.1'/><text x='50%' y='45%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-weight='bold' font-size='40' fill='white'>Web Development</text><text x='50%' y='60%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-size='20' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.8'>HTML, CSS, React, Node.js</text></svg>

title: Advanced UI/UX Design Principles
description: Master the art of creating beautiful, user-centric interfaces and responsive designs.
image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='600' height='400' viewBox='0 0 600 400'><defs><linearGradient id='g2' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='%23006fee'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='%2300b4d8'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(%23g2)'/><rect x='400' y='50' width='150' height='150' rx='20' transform='rotate(15 475 125)' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.1'/><circle cx='100' cy='300' r='100' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.08'/><text x='50%' y='45%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-weight='bold' font-size='40' fill='white'>UI/UX Design</text><text x='50%' y='60%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-size='20' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.8'>Figma, Prototyping, Research</text></svg>

title: Digital Marketing Masterclass
description: Comprehensive guide to SEO, social media marketing, and email campaigns.
image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='600' height='400' viewBox='0 0 600 400'><defs><linearGradient id='g3' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='%23f5a524'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='%23f31262'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(%23g3)'/><polygon points='500,50 550,150 450,150' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.1' transform='rotate(45 500 100)'/><circle cx='100' cy='320' r='120' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.08'/><text x='50%' y='45%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-weight='bold' font-size='40' fill='white'>Digital Marketing</text><text x='50%' y='60%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-size='20' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.8'>SEO, Social Media, Ads</text></svg>

title: Python for Data Science
description: Dive into data analysis, visualization, and machine learning with Python.
image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='600' height='400' viewBox='0 0 600 400'><defs><linearGradient id='g4' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='%2317c964'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='%23006fee'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(%23g4)'/><circle cx='500' cy='300' r='100' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.1'/><rect x='80' y='50' width='100' height='100' rx='10' transform='rotate(30 130 100)' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.08'/><text x='50%' y='45%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-weight='bold' font-size='40' fill='white'>Data Science</text><text x='50%' y='60%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-size='20' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.8'>Python, Pandas, ML</text></svg>

title: Mobile App Development with React Native
description: Build cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android using React Native.
image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='600' height='400' viewBox='0 0 600 400'><defs><linearGradient id='g5' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='%237828c8'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='%23006fee'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(%23g5)'/><circle cx='300' cy='200' r='180' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.05'/><text x='50%' y='45%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-weight='bold' font-size='40' fill='white'>Mobile Apps</text><text x='50%' y='60%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-size='20' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.8'>React Native, iOS, Android</text></svg>

title: Photography and Video Editing
description: Learn the basics of photography and professional video editing techniques.
image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='600' height='400' viewBox='0 0 600 400'><defs><linearGradient id='g6' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='%23f31262'/><stop offset='50%' stop-color='%237828c8'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='%23006fee'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(%23g6)'/><circle cx='150' cy='150' r='100' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.08'/><text x='50%' y='45%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-weight='bold' font-size='40' fill='white'>Photography</text><text x='50%' y='60%' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='middle' font-family='system-ui,sans-serif' font-size='20' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.8'>Editing, Lighting, Composition</text></svg>
